title: Cooking & Exploring New Cuisine
desc: I enjoy experimenting with food and creating fusion dishes that mix different flavors and cultures.

detail.body: Outside of engineering, I enjoy cooking and exploring new cuisines. One dish I am proud of making is peanut butter noodles with shrimp and lamb, a fusion idea inspired by Thai and Korean flavors. Cooking gives me another way to be creative, experiment with combinations, and enjoy small moments outside of school.

media.caption: Peanut butter noodles with shrimp and lamb
